params.directory: The directory of terminals and controllers for projects.
params.trustedForwarder: The trusted forwarder for the ERC2771Context.

isTrustedForwarder(address).details: Indicates whether any particular address is the trusted forwarder.

launchProjectFor(address,(string,string,.details: Forwards `msg.value` to `JBProjects.createFor` to cover any configured project creation fee.

params.controller: The controller that the project's rulesets will be queued with.
params.deployTiersHookConfig: Configuration which dictates the behavior of the 721 tiers hook to deploy.
params.launchProjectConfig: Configuration which dictates the behavior of the project to launch.
params.owner: The address to set as the owner of the project. The ERC-721 which confers this project's ownership will be sent to this address.
params.salt: A salt to use for the deterministic deployment.

returns.hook: The 721 tiers hook that was deployed for the project.
returns.projectId: The ID of the newly launched project.

launchRulesetsFor(uint256,(string,string.details: Only a project's owner or an operator with `LAUNCH_RULESETS & SET_TERMINALS` can launch its rulesets.

params.controller: The controller that the project's rulesets will be queued with.
params.deployTiersHookConfig: Configuration which dictates the behavior of the 721 tiers hook to deploy.
params.launchRulesetsConfig: Configuration which dictates the project's new rulesets.
params.projectId: The ID of the project to launch rulesets for.
params.projectUri: Metadata URI to associate with the project. Pass an empty string to leave it unchanged.
params.salt: A salt to use for the deterministic deployment.

returns.hook: The 721 tiers hook that was deployed for the project.
returns.rulesetId: The ID of the successfully created ruleset.

queueRulesetsOf(uint256,(string,string,s.details: Only a project's owner or an operator with the `QUEUE_RULESETS` permission can queue its rulesets.

params.controller: The controller that the project's rulesets will be queued with.
params.deployTiersHookConfig: Configuration which dictates the behavior of the 721 tiers hook to deploy.
params.projectId: The ID of the project to queue rulesets for.
params.queueRulesetsConfig: Configuration which dictates the project's newly queued rulesets.
params.salt: A salt to use for the deterministic deployment.

returns.hook: The 721 tiers hook that was deployed for the project.
returns.rulesetId: The ID of the successfully created ruleset.

trustedForwarder().details: Returns the address of the trusted forwarder.

DIRECTORY().notice: The directory of terminals and controllers for projects.

HOOK_DEPLOYER().notice: The deployer contract used to create new 721 tiers hook instances via clone.

launchProjectFor(address,(string,string,.notice: Launches a new project with a 721 tiers hook attached.

launchRulesetsFor(uint256,(string,string.notice: Launches rulesets for a project with an attached 721 tiers hook.

onERC721Received(address,address,uint256.notice: Accepts project NFT reservations minted by `JBProjects.createFor`.

queueRulesetsOf(uint256,(string,string,s.notice: Queues rulesets for a project with an attached 721 tiers hook.
